title: eBuyGB Mum's Tea & Biscuits Board, Wooden Treat Board, Snack Tray, Mother's Day Gift, Birthday Gifts for Mum,Brown
features: Our engraved Tea & Biscuits Board makes the perfect gift for Mum for their birthday, Mother's Day or Christmas this year. We are sure that this unique Tea & Biscuits Board will get plenty of use, to indulge with a well deserved tea and biscuits every morning!
Perfectly paired with her favourite biscuits, we are sure it will go down a treat!

If you are on the hunt for a beautifully personalised mother's day gift to show Grandma just how much she is appreciated, one of these custom engraved Tea & Biscuit Boards will perfectly serve the purpose.
